Description

How Castellini and Datex Modernized 3PL Food Logistics
3Likes
28Views
Apr 202026
Discover how Castellini, a leading 3PL in cold storage and perishable food logistics, modernized their operations with Datex’s all-in-one WMS solution. Glenn VanLandingham, VP of Solutioning & Implementation at Datex, and Chris Larson, CEO of Castellini, discuss how they addressed flexibility, temperature-zone management, dynamic pricing, and customer reporting. Learn how phased implementation and real-time tools improved efficiency, visibility, and service for Castellini’s clients. #3PL #FoodLogistics #ColdStorage #WarehouseManagement #Datex #SupplyChain #PerishableGoods #LogisticsTechnology #OrderFulfillment #WMS #CustomerPortal #ContinuousImprovement #ColdChain #ThirdPartyLogistics …...more
